title: Plutarch, Moralia: On the Sign of Socrates
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On the Sign of Socrates.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On the Sign of Socrates.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On the Sign of Socrates': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
